notes:
v1.9.4 Update
🔧 midi-qol Item Triggers Fixed: On Use and Keyword triggers now work correctly with midi-qol for all item types (weapons, spells, equipment).
🎨 UI: Renamed 'Create Group' button to 'Create All-Out' to reduce confusion. System hook options hidden when midi-qol is active.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.9.4
announcement.content:
v1.9.4 — midi-qol Compatibility Fix

  • 🔧 Item Triggers: On Use / Keyword triggers now work with midi-qol for all item types (weapons, spells, equipment, consumables).
  • 🎨 UI: 'Create Group' → 'Create All-Out' button rename. System hook options hidden when midi-qol active.
